data.name: PluginDev_NewExtensionProject
data.comment: Window title and header for the new plugin wizard

data.name: PluginDev_SelectOutputDir
data.value: Select output directory for the plugin project
data.comment: OpenFolderDialog title on page 1 of the wizard

data.name: PluginDev_Permissions
data.comment: GroupBox header on wizard page 3

data.name: PluginDev_IsolationMode
data.comment: GroupBox header on wizard page 3

data.name: PluginDev_LoadPriority
data.comment: Label for the load priority slider on wizard page 3

data.name: PluginDev_Next
data.comment: Navigation button label for advancing wizard pages

data.name: PluginDev_CreateAndOpen
data.comment: Final wizard step button — creates and opens the plugin project

data.name: PluginDev_PluginCreated
data.comment: MessageBox title shown after successful plugin project creation

data.name: PluginDev_Error
data.comment: MessageBox title shown on plugin creation failure

data.name: PluginDev_PublishExtensionPackage
data.comment: Window title and heading for the publisher dialog

data.name: PluginDev_SignBeforePublish
data.comment: CheckBox label for optional signing step in the publisher dialog

data.name: PluginDev_Browse
data.comment: Button label for opening a folder browser dialog

data.name: PluginDev_OpenOutputFolder
data.comment: Link button shown after successful packaging

data.name: PluginDev_Package
data.comment: Button label that triggers the packaging action

data.name: PluginDev_Close
data.comment: Button label to close the publisher dialog

data.name: PluginDev_SelectOutputDirPackage
data.comment: OpenFolderDialog title in the publisher dialog

data.name: PluginDev_ExportDevLog
data.comment: SaveFileDialog title when exporting the plugin dev log

data.name: PluginDev_Search
data.comment: Button label in the Browse tab of the marketplace panel

data.name: PluginDev_Browse_Tab
data.comment: Tab header for the Browse tab in the marketplace panel

data.name: PluginDev_Installed
data.comment: Tab header for the Installed tab in the marketplace panel

data.name: PluginDev_UpdateAll
data.comment: Toolbar button in the Updates tab of the marketplace panel

data.name: PluginDev_Updates
data.comment: Tab header for the Updates tab in the marketplace panel

data.name: PluginDev_ExtensionMarketplace
data.comment: MessageBox caption used in install/uninstall confirmations

data.name: PluginDev_ExtensionLabel
data.comment: Label preceding the plugin selector ComboBox in the toolbar

data.name: PluginDev_ConfigLabel
data.comment: Label preceding the configuration selector ComboBox in the toolbar

data.name: PluginDev_Ready
data.comment: Initial StatusText value in generated PanelPluginTemplate ViewModel

data.name: PluginDev_Refresh
data.comment: Toolbar refresh button label in the Installed tab of the marketplace panel

data.name: PluginDev_Col_Name
data.comment: GridViewColumn header for package name

data.name: PluginDev_Col_Author
data.comment: GridViewColumn header for package author

data.name: PluginDev_Col_Version
data.comment: GridViewColumn header for package version

data.name: PluginDev_Col_Rating
data.comment: GridViewColumn header for package rating

data.name: PluginDev_Col_Downloads
data.comment: GridViewColumn header for package download count

data.name: PluginDev_AutoRebuild
data.value: Rebuild plugin automatically on file save

data.name: PluginDev_CopyOutput
data.value: Copy output to plugin directory after successful build

data.name: PluginDev_ShowDevMode
data.value: Show 'Plugin Dev Mode' indicator in status bar
